2.0 Methods 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
Impact of Transition from 27 to 30 CCW Chronic Conditions │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 10 

• For each of the 27 conditions, there were beneficiaries for whom the “ever’ date is 18 years different (i.e., it was in 
1999 in the MBSF_CC file) 

For some conditions, there are a large number of beneficiaries who had a first occurrence date before 2016. The first 
occurrence date is often in 1999, which is the earliest year possible in the 27 CCW Chronic
